overall.description: A first-person walk through a stormy suburban street at night in a video game (GTA V). The camera moves steadily along a sidewalk past a lit 'For Rent' billboard and palm trees, approaching an intersection as lightning flashes across the dark sky.

events.description: bright lightning flash illuminates the stormy sky overhead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to the road, passing a tall palm tree

entered.detail: thick palm tree trunk immediately adjacent to the left side of the path
illuminated commercial sign reading 'APARTMENTS FOR RENT' with contact information
low stone retaining wall topped with hedges and flowering bushes
tall modern street lamp casting light on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a stormy night walk along a suburban sidewalk. A large illuminated 'For Rent' billboard stands on the right behind a hedge wall, while a palm tree trunk looms close on the left. At approximately 3.5 seconds, a bright lightning flash briefly illuminates the cloudy sky. The street is empty of vehicles and pedestrians.

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the sidewalk as the apartment sign recedes and an intersection becomes visible ahead

entered.detail: paved road intersection with traffic markings becoming visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Having passed the apartment sign, the camera continues along the sidewalk toward an upcoming intersection. The palm tree falls behind to the left while the street lamp post is now alongside. The road ahead opens up to reveal a cross street with stop markings visible in the distance.

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the crosswalk at the intersection, moving from sidewalk to road crossing

entered.detail: white painted zebra stripes marking the pedestrian crossing area
thick white stop line painted across the asphalt road surface

segments.scene_description: The camera arrives at the intersection where the sidewalk meets the crosswalk. White painted crossing markings and stop lines are now visible on the asphalt. The street lamp has receded into the distance as the camera moves into the open intersection area, with the stormy night sky still visible overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a stormy suburban sidewalk that gradually opens into a wide, empty intersection. It begins beside a large illuminated For Rent billboard and a looming palm tree, while a sudden flash of lightning briefly brightens the dark, cloudy sky. As the camera moves forward, the billboard and palm tree recede to the left, replaced by the steady presence of a street lamp post as the road ahead begins to widen. The scene then shifts toward the edge of the pavement, where the sidewalk meets the asphalt of a cross street. Finally, the camera moves into the open intersection area, passing over white painted crossing markings and stop lines under the persistent stormy night sky.
